MOTION TO ESTABLISH QUALIFIED SETTLEMENT FUND AND FOR RELEASE OF CLAIMS, PROOF OF SERVICE, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN ROES 1-15 HEARING SET FOR NOV-16-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
ORDER APPROVING THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A QUALIFIED SETTLEMENT FUND AND FOR RELEASE OF CLAIMS

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. ADMINISTRATOR OF THE ZALKIN CLIENTS' QUALIFIED SETTLEMENT FUND'S MOTION TO TERMINATE THE QUALIFIED SETTLEMENT FUND IS OFF CALENDAR. INSUFFICIENT PROOF OF SERVICE UNDER CCP 1005. IN ADDITION, THE MOVING PARTY DID NOT ATTACH COPIES OF EXHIBITS 1 AND 2 WHICH ARE REFERRED TO IN THE MOTION. SEE MOTION AT PG. 2 AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAYO, 2. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN ROES 1-15
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-21-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN ROES 1-15

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JOHN ROES 1-15'S MOTION TO TERMINATE THE QUALIFIED SETTLEMENT FUND IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 21, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 18, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS NO COURTESY COPIES OF ANY PAPERS. THE MOVING PAPERS ARE NOT SCANNED ON THE COURT'S REGISTER OF ACTIONS. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-21-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motiohn And Motion To Terminate The Qualified Settlement Fund;
Off Calendar Oct-21-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF JOHN ROES 1-15'S MOTION TO TERMINATE THE QUALIFIED SETTLEMENT FUND.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Granted, for good cause shown. No opposition filed. The Court will review the proposed order submitted. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185 (302/MJM)

Notice Of Motiohn And Motion To Terminate The Qualified Settlement Fund;
Off Calendar Sep-18-2013 Continued To Oct-21-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JOHN ROES 1-15's Motion To Terminate The Qualified Settlement Fund is continued to October 21, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than September 18, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has no courtesy copies of any papers. The moving papers are not scanned on the Court's register of actions. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Terminate The Qualified Settlement Fund
Off Calendar Jun-21-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
ADMINISTRATOR OF THE ZALKIN CLIENTS' QUALIFIED SETTLEMENT FUND'S motion To Terminate The Qualified Settlement Fund is Off calendar. Insufficient proof of service under CCP 1005. In addition, the moving party did not attach copies of Exhibits 1 and 2 which are referred to in the motion. See Motion at pg. 2 and Affidavit of Mayo, 2. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
